Translation.Text: NobilMetal BOLTS LV - R020420 Do only use original parts produced by Nobil Metal SpA. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.nobilmetal.it/en/products.aspx?id=07EB07EF07EA Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.nobilmetal.it/en/products.aspx?id=07EB07EF07EA The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use. Nobil Metal SpA does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Nobil Metal SpA origins. More Information: http://www.nobilmetal.it/
